note: Calibrated L0 baseline: judge v2 (intent assertions, brief-grounded areas, synonym concepts, policy-B room count) on the 26-brief corpus (22 + the per-room-area slice), seed 20260711, max_completion_tokens 16384. The 9% intent rate under judge v1 was ~55-65% measurement artifact (deep-dive H2); the true one-shot deliverable rate measures 50%, inside the predicted 45-60% band. Same run's deterministic dividend (--l1): intent 18/26 (69%, ΔL0→L1 +5), sound 6/26 (+2), 7 briefs healed by 47 repair moves + 0 fix edits — L1 numbers are recorded here for reference only; this baseline and every delta against it are L0.
